# UI implementation rules

Read `.uizze/design-contract.md` before suggesting frontend changes. Keep the
primary job and action explicit, use semantic tokens, and include loading,
empty, error, success, validation, keyboard, and responsive behavior.

Do not suggest generic dashboard filler, decorative gradients, inert controls,
fake metrics, vague copy, or a new design system when the existing one works.
Run `npm run validate` before calling UI work complete.
